narrative:
Oakwood-03-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 390 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 55.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 50.8 percentage points.
